changes: Added endpoint-level service_tier passthrough, configurable in Desktop and Server WebUI and disabled by default for upstream compatibility
Added xhigh reasoning effort support across OpenAI Chat and Responses API conversion paths
Added SQLite persistence, automatic migration, backup merge, and conflict detection support for the service_tier setting
Updated GitHub Actions build environment to Go 1.24.3 and pinned Wails CLI to v2.11.0
Added per-credential Token Pool usage stats (requests/errors/tokens) with quick view
Added per-credential token refresh and improved the token update prompt
Refined the Token Pool list UI with latest-used highlighting and clearer status/error display
Added Codex rate limit/credits fetching with manual refresh (including per-credential refresh)
Captured Codex rate limit snapshots from API responses and SSE events for better accuracy
Added rate limit storage and Token Pool display with compact summary + tooltip details
Added multi-file JSON import for credential pools
Improved Token Pool UI: masked email display, fixed timestamp format, compact stats bar, refined layout and actions
Added per-credential rate limit refresh feedback showing the latest usage summary
Added Codex Token Pool authentication mode with endpoint-level credential pool support
Implemented credential lifecycle management: bulk import/update/delete, enable/disable, activation, status tracking, and refresh-on-401
Added dedicated Token Pool management UI for Desktop and Web, including Codex proxy configuration and improved action layout
Hardened Codex /responses handling with stream enforcement compatibility and improved retry/failover behavior
Made endpoint model optional and only override upstream model when a value is provided (Codex Token Pool friendly)
Fixed token accounting issues where request counts increased but token totals stayed unchanged in specific Codex streaming scenarios
Updated endpoint behavior for Codex mode with fixed upstream route and transformer constraints for better compatibility
Fixed incorrect endpoint count in the statistics bar by syncing visible active/total endpoint counters after config reload
Fixed endpoint index mismatch after filtering to prevent edit/test/delete/toggle actions from targeting the wrong endpoint
Stats update migrated from polling to event-driven, eliminating performance overhead
Implemented 4-period cache architecture, reducing period switching latency from 200ms to <5ms
Fixed endpoint cards not updating stats after period switching or filtering
Optimized initialization order to ensure endpoint cards display correct stats
Added endpoint filtering feature with multi-select by transformer type/enabled status/test status
Optimized startup endpoint testing with concurrent execution for faster startup
Completed 12 critical fixes for stability and performance
Added fallback for token usage in streaming responses
Display request size in HTTP/2 stream error logs
Fixed data backup and restore error
OpenAI to Claude streaming logic supports think tags
Added CodeX launcher feature with completion notification
Beautified local backup and S3 backup UI
Add local backup and S3 backup features
Add Web UI for Docker service
Add Markdown parsing for session history details
Add launcher feature for one-click CC startup
Add red dot notification for update detection
Add multiple new themes, now 12 themes available
Data backup and restore bug fixes
Change popups to modal dialogs to prevent accidental closing
Add WebDAV feature for cross-device data sync
Add smart build and dev scripts
Add drag-and-drop sorting for manual proxy priority control
Add dynamic window resizing with size memory
Add current endpoint display and manual switch feature
Add 'Switch' button for manual endpoint switching
Auto sync status using existing refresh mechanism
Support Bearer authentication for more API providers
